name_cn:
New Release🆕Chanel 25s Spring/Summer
Cross-handle Mini Kelly Pale Pink
Purchased at the counter for 31,800 RMB~
Bestseller Rebirth🔥New version Mini Kelly cross-handle
Where Chanel's legendary aesthetics meet exquisite craftsmanship,
this cross-chain handle Mini Kelly was born.
With a unique design, it has an elegant handbag feel,
and can be casually slung for diverse fashion looks~
Hardware: Thick-plated 14k pale gold clasp
Material: Impala "Three Sheep" small ball pattern
Size: 10*18*4.5 cm
